curiosityQuestion: Have you ever wondered how SQL & Databases Troubleshooting Part 4C works under the hood in SQL & Databases?
whyExists: SQL & Databases Troubleshooting Part 4C is a core building block in SQL & Databases. It solves fundamental structural and data manipulation problems that arise when building scalable applications.
realWorldAnalogy: Think of SQL & Databases Troubleshooting Part 4C like a well-designed component in an everyday physical system — organizing, transforming, and routing data efficiently.
simpleExplanation: At its foundation, SQL & Databases Troubleshooting Part 4C provides a clear, standardized way to execute logic in SQL & Databases. This section explains every detail step by step from absolute zero.
syntaxExplanation:
Here is the core syntax for SQL & Databases Troubleshooting Part 4C:

```sql
-- SQL Database query for SQL & Databases Troubleshooting Part 4C
SELECT id, title, category, created_at
FROM application_records
WHERE category = 'SQL & Databases Troubleshooting Part 4C' AND is_active = 1
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 10;
```
